title: Rustic Foods
description: A texture pack that transforms Minecraft's food icons with a rich, rustic style full of charm and detail.
body:
Rustic Foods is a flavorful texture pack that reimagines Minecraft’s food icons with a warm, handcrafted aesthetic. Each item has been carefully redesigned to evoke the charm of medieval kitchens, countryside markets, and old-world feasts. Whether you're baking bread, cooking meats, or harvesting crops, this pack adds a cozy, lived-in feel to your inventory with detailed, earthy textures that fit perfectly into rustic or fantasy-themed worlds.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
